creator: bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de
text:
This patch updates the port devel/gsoap from 2.7.9l to 2.7.10.
	Additionally it makes some clean ups, e.g. remove old and
	unnecessary patches.

	I also like to install the gsoap source code files stdsoap2.c
	and stdsoap2.cpp, because it gives developers of webservices
	the chance to recompile the gSOAP framework with specific
	options, e.g. WITH_LEAN or WITH_LEANER which are useful in
	embedded environments.
